nextAction: Review the OPS-25 detailed agreement proposal and decide whether to approve, adjust, or hold Ready For Code before implementation opens.

candidateGates.description: Required evidence artifacts exist for the active work item.
Referenced packet, SSOT, validation, and trace sources resolve locally.
A lightweight semantic trace artifact exists for the active work item.
Trace, packet, and active work metadata do not contradict each other.
Validation and trace timestamps match the current report turn.
Validation report and ACTIVE_CONTEXT expose the same validation summary.

securityReview.notApplicableReason: Reusable security-review evidence is not requested by current packet/runtime metadata.
